creator: truckman@FreeBSD.org
text: The "creation of executable memory area failed: No such file or directory" errors appear to be caused by a recent poudriere change.  I can reproduce them with a copy of the jail that is older than the clang 6 upgrade.  mkstemp() is trying to create a scratch file under /nonexistent, which is ~nobody.  Poudriere was changed to run builds as nobody a while ago, but these errors are much more recent.
